scripts.bundle:verify: npm run bundle && npm run validate
scripts.generate:client: npm run bundle && npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli version-manager set 7.4.0 && npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o typescript-fetch-client --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,npmName=@polito/api-client,npmVersion=1.0.0
scripts.generate:client:fix: npm run generate:client && npm run fix:client
scripts.fix:client: echo '// @ts-nocheck' | cat - typescript-fetch-client/src/runtime.ts > temp && mv temp typescript-fetch-client/src/runtime.ts && ([ -f typescript-fetch-client/src/models/FeatureAllOfId.ts ] && (echo '// @ts-nocheck' | cat - typescript-fetch-client/src/models/FeatureAllOfId.ts > temp && mv temp typescript-fetch-client/src/models/FeatureAllOfId.ts) || true)
